events.description:
Purpose: 
Work as a team to:
  • Set FY24 Team Goals
  • Set FY 24 KPI Targets


Agenda:
5 Minutes: Tyler Leads Check-in to get brains working 
5 Minutes: Tyler Describes Agenda
10 Minutes: Natalie Shares / Sets Intention
40 Minutes: 
  • Ops & BD Pair Up in a break out room
  • SE & Product Pair Up in a break out room
  • In Breakout rooms each Team works to develop their FY24 Goals


           5 Minutes Review Provided Info
          10 Minutes  Ideate FY24 Goals on provided Stickies
           5 Minutes Cluster / Group Stickies in SPAs Chart
          10 Minutes Cross Colloborate & Communicate about where you see clusters
          10 Minutes Work to develop 3 - 6 Safe to Try FY24 Goals for your Team


40 Minutes:
  • In Breakout rooms each Team works to develop their FY24 KPI Targets
  • Ops & BD Pair Up in a break out room
  • SE & Product Pair Up in a break out room
  • Tyler will create extra “Flex Break Out rooms” – in case individual teams need to break out further for specific KPIs


10 Minutes: Teams develop plan to reconvene prior to January 5th if they need to revise or further develop goals and targets
5 Minutes: Reconvene as a whole team and wrap up. Tyler references next steps


Links:
  • FY24 Meeting Plan/Schedule 
  • Goals Mural Board
  • KPI Monday Board
  • Strategic Plan Power Point
  • How to Write Smart Goals

events.description:
Agenda:

  1. High level architecture
  2. Contribot getting moved over (maybe this has already been planned)

• For those attending in 15 and see this message. I apologize, I thought I had sent this out last week to your team, and seems I missed it. I will explain everything at the beginning of our call, but resources are here for those attending:Hi team in looking towards our Activities Planning session this upcoming Tuesday please see some key actions and resources below:To do prior:
    • Watch this 5 Min. video of me explaining the agenda, process, and expectations for this meeting here.
    • Review finalized team goals here. (LT will provide a 15 min overview at the beginning of the meeting but you can review here first)

    Other Resources:
    • Mural Board for our working session is here.
    • Key links, Agenda, and Purpose live here.

events.summary: FY24 Q1 Team Goals Share Out
events.description:
Purpose: Learn about other team goals and clarify cross collaborative opportunities


Agenda
Each team lead shares main activities for the quarter as related to each SPA and team members can chime in and ask questions so there's an opportunity to discuss.

  • 5 Minutes: Check-in to get brains working (All Together)

  • 30 Minutes: Product & SE Team Shares Out

  • 15 Minutes: BD Team Shares Out

  • 10 Minutes: Ops Team Shares Out

  • 5 Minutes: Close meeting

Retro board
Retro board

Hi all, I'm blocking some time for us to event storm / build out an opportunity solution tree for API and "big fish" customers (high dollar value API users). 

The idea is to do this ahead of the start of Q2 planning cycles so that we better understand customer pain points and what we may need to allocate space for in Q2, ahead of actually planning the work for Q2.
Review the timeline. Adjust the scope and priority of epics to meet the current needs.
Retro board
Review the timeline. Adjust the scope and priority of epics to meet the current needs.

Homework to do prior:
  • Update the status column on your individual activity boards in Monday
  • Review your team dashboards to reflect on what we achieved or did not achieve this quarter
    • Ops - Goals Dashboard in Monday
    • BD - Goals Dashboard in Monday
    • PDE & SE - Goals Dashboard in Monday

Key Links
  • Mural Board we are working off today (Left side of the Mural board today)

Agenda
  • 10 Minutes: All Team Warm up / Break Out - What Q1 activity that you achieved were you most proud of?
  • 15 Minutes: Team lead walks through Monday team dashboards. Lead conversation about what was accomplished and what was missed.
  • 40 Minutes: Teams answer retro questions on stickies in the OS Hub canvas and cluster where similarities exist
  • 20 Minutes: Discuss themes, determine open questions, determine next actions. Complete Top 5 Learnings/Next Actions

Homework to do prior:
  • Reflect on the organizations 3 year SPAs & FY24 Goals prior to this meeting
  • Review your team dashboards to reflect on what we achieved or did not achieve this past quarter
    • Ops - Goals Dashboard in Monday
    • BD - Goals Dashboard in Monday
    • PDE & SE - Goals Dashboard in Monday
Key Links
  • Mural Board we are working off today (Right side of the Mural board today)

Agenda

  • 5 Minutes: All Team Warm up - What activity are you most looking forward to potentially doing in Q2?
  • 15 Minutes: Natalie orients/frames todays working session / Breakout to respective rooms
  • 40 Minutes: Sticky Q2 activities / cluster in Q2 & Q3 and Beyond. (Use Monday boards, retro info, SPAs, and org goals to complete this exercise)
  • 30 Minutes: Determine Ownership & Prioritization
  • HW: Implement Q2 Activities into the Q2 Group in your personal Monday boards
Retro board

events.summary: Q1 & Q2 Team Share Out (Remind Tyler to Record)
events.description:
Homework to do prior:
  • Review your teams retro and look forward work from the last two days via the Mural
  • Team Leads share highlights by filling out their teams slide on this quarterly share out Canva deck. 
    • The last slide is open challenges for discussion, each team has a column to share any items they want to discuss with the team.

Agenda
  • 5 Minutes: All Team Warm up - Whats something new you learned through the mural sessions the past two days about OS Hub?
  • 40 Minutes: Teams Leads share their slides answering the following 4 questions. Slides & Feedback from teams will be capped at 10 minutes each.
    • What we accomplished?
    • What was delayed/not accomplished?
    • Learnings/next actions from Retro
    • Priority Q2 Activities for your Team
  • 15 Minutes: Open Challenges for Discussion
